Bash(python3 -c "
from dotenv import load_dotenv
import os

load_dotenv\(\)

print\(''✅ 环境变量检查:''\)
print\(f''   LLM_API_KEY: {""已设置"" if os.getenv\(""LLM_API_KEY""\) else ""未设置""} \({len\(os.getenv\(""LLM_API_KEY"", """"\)\)} 字符\)''\)
print\(f''   LLM_MODEL_ID: {os.getenv\(""LLM_MODEL_ID"", ""未设置""\)}''\)
print\(f''   LLM_BASE_URL: {os.getenv\(""LLM_BASE_URL"", ""未设置""\)}''\)
print\(\)
print\(''配置完成！可以运行: python3 react_agent_real.py''\)
")
